metadata.name: Assign a Crew to a Train

description: A train is scheduled to depart. A crew dispatcher needs to assign a qualified and rested crew to operate it.

nodes.task_description: Select the train that needs a crew assignment.
View the list of available crews, showing their qualifications and rest status.

expected_outcome.expected: A list of rested and available crews is displayed.

nodes.task_description: Select a crew that is qualified for the specific route and has sufficient rest.

expected_outcome.expected: Dispatcher makes a compliant crew choice.

nodes.task_description: Assign the selected crew to the train and notify them of their assignment.

expected_outcome.expected: The crew is assigned, and they receive a notification with the report time and location.
